stemHtml: While in the cruise at FL350 in RVSM airspace, you receive a TCAS Resolution Advisory (RA) “CLIMB”. The command is to climb at 1500 ft/minute. What do you do regarding the ATC clearance?

options.a: Follow the RA immediately, inform ATC as soon as possible after starting the climb.
options.b: Request climb clearance from ATC before following RA — RVSM requires altitude adherence.
options.c: Follow RA only if you can confirm no traffic at FL360+.
options.d: Level off at FL355 and request clearance to FL360.
